presets.description: Pop a UI element in from zero scale with back easing.
presets.code:
static func pop_in(target: Node, duration: float = 0.18) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.scale = Vector2.ZERO
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Pop a UI element out to zero scale.
presets.code:
static func pop_out(target: Node, duration: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "scale", Vector2.ZERO, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func fade_in(target: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.25) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.modulate.a = 0.0
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "modulate:a", 1.0, duration)
	return t

static func fade_out(target: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.25) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "modulate:a", 0.0, duration)
	return t

static func slide_in_left(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.position.x -= 200
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:x", target.position.x + 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func slide_in_right(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.position.x += 200
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:x", target.position.x - 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func slide_in_top(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.position.y -= 200
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:y", target.position.y + 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func slide_in_bottom(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.position.y += 200
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:y", target.position.y - 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func camera_shake_small(camera: Camera2D, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var o := camera.offset
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	for _i in range(6):
		t.tween_property(camera, "offset", Vector2(randf_range(-4,4), randf_range(-4,4)), duration/6.0)
	t.tween_property(camera, "offset", o, 0.05)
	return t

static func camera_shake_medium(camera: Camera2D, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var o := camera.offset
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	for _i in range(8):
		t.tween_property(camera, "offset", Vector2(randf_range(-10,10), randf_range(-10,10)), duration/8.0)
	t.tween_property(camera, "offset", o, 0.05)
	return t

static func camera_shake_large(camera: Camera2D, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var o := camera.offset
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	for _i in range(10):
		t.tween_property(camera, "offset", Vector2(randf_range(-20,20), randf_range(-20,20)), duration/10.0)
	t.tween_property(camera, "offset", o, 0.05)
	return t

static func sprite_damage_flash(sprite: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.12) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var orig := sprite.modulate
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(sprite, "modulate", Color.WHITE, duration*0.5)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "modulate", orig, duration*0.5)
	return t

static func move_to_position(node: Node2D, target_pos: Vector2, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", target_pos, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func hover_bob(node: Node2D, height: float = 8.0, duration: float = 1.5) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var y0 := node.position.y
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(node, "position:y", y0-height, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "position:y", y0+height, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Tween dissolve amount on a shader material.
presets.code:
static func shader_fade_dissolve(mat: Material, duration: float = 1.0) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	mat.set_shader_parameter("dissolve_amount", 0.0)
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("dissolve_amount", v), 0.0, 1.0, duration)
	return t

static func sequence_robot_activate(robot: Node2D, duration: float = 0.8) -> Tween:
	if not robot: return null
	robot.scale = Vector2.ZERO
	robot.modulate.a = 0.3
	var t := robot.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(robot, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.6).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(robot, "modulate:a", 1.0, duration*0.4)
	t.set_parallel(false)
	for _i in range(3):
		t.tween_property(robot, "modulate", Color(1.3,1.3,1.3,1), duration*0.05)
		t.tween_property(robot, "modulate", Color.WHITE, duration*0.05)
	return t

static func bounce_in(target: Node, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	target.scale = Vector2.ZERO
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_ELASTIC).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func button_press(button: Control, duration: float = 0.08) -> Tween:
	if not button: return null
	var t := button.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(button, "scale", Vector2(0.92, 0.92), duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func button_release(button: Control, duration: float = 0.12) -> Tween:
	if not button: return null
	var t := button.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(button, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func hover_grow(control: Control, duration: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not control: return null
	var t := control.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(control, "scale", Vector2(1.08, 1.08), duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func hover_shrink(control: Control, duration: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not control: return null
	var t := control.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(control, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Drop in from top with bounce.
presets.code:
static func notification_drop(target: Control, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var final_y := target.position.y
	target.position.y = -100
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:y", final_y, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BOUNCE).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Rise up and fade out like a toast.
presets.code:
static func toast_rise(target: Control, duration: float = 1.5) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(target, "position:y", target.position.y - 60, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	t.tween_property(target, "modulate:a", 0.0, duration*0.6).set_delay(duration*0.4)
	return t

presets.description: Expand a panel from zero size.
presets.code:
static func panel_expand(panel: Control, target_size: Vector2, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not panel: return null
	panel.custom_minimum_size = Vector2.ZERO
	var t := panel.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(panel, "custom_minimum_size", target_size, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Collapse a panel to zero size.
presets.code:
static func panel_collapse(panel: Control, duration: float = 0.25) -> Tween:
	if not panel: return null
	var t := panel.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(panel, "custom_minimum_size", Vector2.ZERO, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func modal_dim(bg: ColorRect, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not bg: return null
	bg.color = Color(0,0,0,0)
	var t := bg.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(bg, "color:a", 0.6, duration)
	return t

static func heal_pulse(sprite: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var orig := sprite.modulate
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(sprite, "modulate", Color.GREEN, duration*0.3)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "modulate", orig, duration*0.7)
	return t

static func collect_pop(sprite: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "scale", Vector2.ONE*1.5, duration*0.3).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "modulate:a", 0.0, duration)
	return t

static func spawn_scale(sprite: Node2D, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	sprite.scale = Vector2.ZERO
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(sprite, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func despawn_scale(sprite: Node2D, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(sprite, "scale", Vector2.ZERO, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func blink(sprite: CanvasItem, blink_count: int = 3, interval: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	for _i in range(blink_count):
		t.tween_callback(func(): sprite.visible = false).set_delay(interval*0.5)
		t.tween_callback(func(): sprite.visible = true).set_delay(interval*0.5)
	return t

static func wiggle(sprite: Node2D, angle: float = 0.15, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not sprite: return null
	var t := sprite.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(sprite, "rotation", angle, duration*0.25)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "rotation", -angle, duration*0.25)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "rotation", angle*0.5, duration*0.25)
	t.tween_property(sprite, "rotation", 0.0, duration*0.25)
	return t

static func shake_small(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var orig := node.position
	var t := node.create_tween()
	for _i in range(5):
		t.tween_property(node, "position", orig + Vector2(randf_range(-3,3), randf_range(-3,3)), duration/5.0)
	t.tween_property(node, "position", orig, 0.03)
	return t

static func squash_stretch(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(1.3, 0.7), duration*0.3).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(0.8, 1.2), duration*0.3).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.4).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func float_idle(node: Node2D, height: float = 6.0) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var y0 := node.position.y
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(node, "position:y", y0 - height, 1.2).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "position:y", y0 + height, 1.2).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func dash_forward(node: Node2D, distance: float = 120.0, duration: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var dir := Vector2.RIGHT.rotated(node.rotation)
	var target := node.global_position + dir * distance
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", target, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func knockback(node: Node2D, source: Vector2, distance: float = 80.0, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var dir := (node.global_position - source).normalized()
	var target := node.global_position + dir * distance
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", target, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func smooth_follow(follower: Node2D, target: Node2D, speed: float = 5.0) -> Tween:
	if not follower or not target: return null
	var t := follower.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_method(func(_v): follower.global_position = follower.global_position.lerp(target.global_position, speed*0.02), 0.0, 1.0, 0.02)
	return t

static func arc_jump(node: Node2D, target_pos: Vector2, height: float = 80.0, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var start := node.global_position
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): node.global_position = start.lerp(target_pos, v) - Vector2(0, sin(v*PI)*height), 0.0, 1.0, duration)
	return t

static func orbit_target(orbiter: Node2D, center: Vector2, radius: float = 100.0, period: float = 3.0) -> Tween:
	if not orbiter: return null
	var t := orbiter.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_method(func(a): orbiter.global_position = center + Vector2(cos(a), sin(a))*radius, 0.0, TAU, period)
	return t

static func zoom_in(camera: Camera2D, target_zoom: Vector2, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(camera, "zoom", target_zoom, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func zoom_out(camera: Camera2D, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(camera, "zoom", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Quick zoom in then out for impact.
presets.code:
static func punch_zoom(camera: Camera2D, strength: float = 0.3, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(camera, "zoom", Vector2.ONE*(1+strength), duration*0.4)
	t.tween_property(camera, "zoom", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.6)
	return t

static func pan_to(camera: Camera2D, target_pos: Vector2, duration: float = 0.8) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var t := camera.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(camera, "global_position", target_pos, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func hit_stop(duration: float = 0.08) -> void:
	Engine.time_scale = 0.05
	Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween().tween_callback(func(): Engine.time_scale = 1.0).set_delay(duration)

static func shader_flash_color(mat: Material, param: String = "flash_amount", duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	mat.set_shader_parameter(param, 1.0)
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter(param, v), 1.0, 0.0, duration)
	return t

static func progress_fill(mat: Material, target: float = 1.0, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("fill_amount", v), 0.0, target, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func intro_card(card: Control, duration: float = 2.0) -> Tween:
	if not card: return null
	card.modulate.a = 0.0
	card.scale = Vector2(0.5, 0.5)
	var t := card.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(card, "modulate:a", 1.0, duration*0.4)
	t.tween_property(card, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.5).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK)
	return t

static func level_complete(label: Label, duration: float = 1.5) -> Tween:
	if not label: return null
	label.modulate.a = 0.0
	label.scale = Vector2(0.3, 0.3)
	var t := label.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(label, "modulate:a", 1.0, duration*0.3).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(label, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.5).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_ELASTIC).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func warning_alarm(target: CanvasItem, count: int = 3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var orig := target.modulate
	var t := target.create_tween()
	for _i in range(count):
		t.tween_property(target, "modulate", Color.RED, 0.25)
		t.tween_property(target, "modulate", orig, 0.25)
	return t

static func coin_counter(label: Label, from_val: int = 0, to_val: int = 100, duration: float = 0.8) -> Tween:
	if not label: return null
	var t := label.create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): label.text = str(int(v)), float(from_val), float(to_val), duration)
	return t

static func slide_out_left(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:x", target.position.x - 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func slide_out_right(target: Control, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not target: return null
	var t := target.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(target, "position:x", target.position.x + 200, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func recoil(node: Node2D, direction: Vector2, distance: float = 40.0, duration: float = 0.1) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var target := node.global_position + direction.normalized()*distance
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", target, duration*0.6).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", node.global_position, duration*0.4).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func jump_squash(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.2) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(0.7, 1.4), duration*0.3)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.7).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_ELASTIC)
	return t

static func landing_squash(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(1.3, 0.6), duration*0.4)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.6).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func cinematic_sway(camera: Camera2D) -> Tween:
	if not camera: return null
	var orig := camera.global_position
	var t := camera.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(camera, "global_position", orig + Vector2(8, 4), 2.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(camera, "global_position", orig + Vector2(-6, -3), 3.0).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func outline_pulse(mat: Material, duration: float = 0.6) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	mat.set_shader_parameter("outline_size", 1.0)
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("outline_size", v), 1.0, 3.0, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("outline_size", v), 3.0, 1.0, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func move_by_offset(node: Node2D, offset: Vector2, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var target := node.global_position + offset
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", target, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func rotate_once(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "rotation", TAU, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

presets.description: Return to origin with elastic easing.
presets.code:
static func elastic_return(node: Node2D, origin: Vector2, duration: float = 0.7) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "global_position", origin, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_ELASTIC).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func conveyor_slide(node: Node2D, direction: Vector2, speed: float = 200.0) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	var step := direction.normalized() * speed * 0.05
	t.tween_callback(func(): node.global_position += step).set_delay(0.05)
	return t

static func magnetic_pull(node: Node2D, target_pos: Vector2, duration: float = 0.6) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var start := node.global_position
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): node.global_position = start.lerp(target_pos, v*v), 0.0, 1.0, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

static func day_to_night(mat: Material, target: float = 0.8, duration: float = 2.0) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("intensity", v), mat.get_shader_parameter("intensity"), target, duration)
	return t

static func heat_intensity(mat: Material, target: float = 0.05, duration: float = 1.0) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("strength", v), 0.0, target, duration)
	return t

static func hologram_glitch(mat: Material, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	for _i in range(5):
		t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("alpha", v), 0.6, 0.1, duration/10.0)
		t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("alpha", v), 0.1, 0.6, duration/10.0)
	return t

static func shield_pulse(mat: Material, duration: float = 0.8) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("pulse", v), 0.0, 1.0, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("pulse", v), 1.0, 0.0, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func low_health_pulse(mat: Material) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("pulse_amount", v), 0.0, 0.8, 0.6).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("pulse_amount", v), 0.8, 0.0, 0.6).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func energy_wave(mat: Material, target_speed: float = 3.0, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not mat: return null
	var t := Engine.get_main_loop().create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): mat.set_shader_parameter("speed", v), 0.0, target_speed, duration)
	return t

static func rotate_to(node: Node2D, angle: float, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "rotation", angle, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_QUAD).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func scale_to(node: Node2D, target_scale: Vector2, duration: float = 0.3) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", target_scale, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func color_fade_to(node: CanvasItem, color: Color, duration: float = 0.4) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "modulate", color, duration).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func typewriter_text(label: Label, full_text: String, speed: float = 0.03) -> Tween:
	if not label: return null
	label.text = ""
	label.visible_ratio = 0
	var t := label.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(label, "visible_ratio", 1.0, float(len(full_text))*speed)
	return t

static func parallax_scroll(node: Node2D, offset: Vector2, duration: float = 5.0) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(node, "position", node.position + offset, duration).as_relative().set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "position", node.position - offset, duration).as_relative().set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func pulse_scale(node: Node2D, min_scale: float = 0.9, max_scale: float = 1.1, duration: float = 0.8) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE*max_scale, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE*min_scale, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func breathing(node: Node2D) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(1.03,1.03), 1.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, 1.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT)
	return t

static func heartbeat(node: Node2D, strength: float = 0.15) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween().set_loops()
	var big := Vector2.ONE*(1+strength); var small := Vector2.ONE*(1+strength*0.3)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", big, 0.12).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, 0.08).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", small, 0.08).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, 0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	return t

presets.description: Animate container children one by one.

presets.code:
static func crossfade(from_node: CanvasItem, to_node: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not from_node or not to_node: return null
	to_node.modulate.a = 0; to_node.visible = true
	var t := from_node.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(from_node, "modulate:a", 0.0, duration)
	t.tween_property(to_node, "modulate:a", 1.0, duration)
	t.chain().tween_callback(func(): from_node.visible = false)
	return t

presets.description: Animate a number counting up (score, timer).
presets.code:
static func count_up(label: Label, from_val: float = 0, to_val: float = 1000, duration: float = 1.0) -> Tween:
	if not label: return null
	var t := label.create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): label.text = str(int(v)), from_val, to_val, duration)
	return t

static func flash_and_fade(node: CanvasItem, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var orig := node.modulate
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "modulate", Color.WHITE, duration*0.2)
	t.tween_property(node, "modulate", Color(orig.r,orig.g,orig.b,0), duration*0.8)
	return t

static func path_follow(node: Node2D, path: Path2D, duration: float = 2.0) -> Tween:
	if not node or not path: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_method(func(v): node.global_position = path.curve.sample_baked(v*path.curve.get_baked_length(),true), 0.0, 1.0, duration)
	return t

static func flip_card(front: Control, back: Control, duration: float = 0.5) -> Tween:
	if not front or not back: return null
	back.scale.x = 0; front.scale.x = 1
	var t := front.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(front, "scale:x", 0.0, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN)
	t.parallel().tween_property(back, "scale:x", 1.0, duration*0.5).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_delay(duration*0.5)
	t.tween_callback(func(): front.visible = false)
	return t

static func sprite_stretch(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.25) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2(1.4,0.6), duration*0.3).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration*0.7).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_ELASTIC).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	return t

static func teleport_in(node: Node2D, duration: float = 0.25) -> Tween:
	if not node: return null
	var ci := node as CanvasItem
	if ci: ci.modulate = Color.WHITE
	node.scale = Vector2.ZERO
	var t := node.create_tween()
	t.set_parallel(true)
	t.tween_property(node, "scale", Vector2.ONE, duration).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK).set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT)
	if ci: t.tween_property(ci, "modulate", Color.WHITE, duration*0.6).from_current()
	return t

presets.description: Wobble scale + random tilt on hover (offset_transform style).
presets.code:
static func btn_hover_wobble(btn: Button) -> void:
	if not btn: return
	btn.pivot_offset = btn.size / 2.0
	btn.mouse_entered.connect(func():
		var t := btn.create_tween().set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK)
		t.set_parallel(true)
		t.tween_property(btn, "scale:x", 1.2, 0.1)
		t.tween_property(btn, "scale:y", 0.75, 0.13)
		t.tween_property(btn, "rotation_degrees", randf_range(5,10)*[-1,1].pick_random(), 0.1)
		t.chain().tween_property(btn, "scale:x", 1.1, 0.15)
		t.tween_property(btn, "scale:y", 1.1, 0.15)
		t.tween_property(btn, "rotation_degrees", 0.0, 0.1)
	)
	btn.mouse_exited.connect(func():
		var t := btn.create_tween().set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC)
		t.set_parallel(true)
		t.tween_property(btn, "scale", Vector2.ONE, 0.15)
		t.tween_property(btn, "rotation_degrees", 0.0, 0.15)
	)

presets.description: Card pops forward on hover using offset_transform.
presets.code:
static func card_hover_pop(card: Panel) -> void:
	if not card: return
	card.pivot_offset = card.size / 2.0
	card.mouse_entered.connect(func():
		card.z_index = 1
		var t := card.create_tween().set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK)
		t.set_parallel(true)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_scale", Vector2.ONE*1.2, 0.1)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_rotation", 0.0, 0.1)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_position_ratio:y", -0.25, 0.15)
	)
	card.mouse_exited.connect(func():
		card.z_index = 0
		var t := card.create_tween().set_ease(Tween.EASE_IN_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC)
		t.set_parallel(true)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_scale", Vector2.ONE, 0.2)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_rotation", 0.0, 0.2)
		t.tween_property(card, "offset_transform_position_ratio:y", 0.0, 0.25)
	)
